title: Heroes Of Minecraft
description: A modpack that includes weapons, bosses, and an insane amount of exploration. Your job. . . Have Fun.
body:
A modpack that includes everything from cambat animations to legendary weapons, the posabilities are endless. 

**But. . .**

Will you die along the way?

Will you give up in the danger?

Will you fall into greed?


**Or. .**

Will you rise victorios?

Will defeat all the bosses?

Will YOU be the new Hero?


**In this modpack. Your story is your's only to tell.**




_First modpack please comment any issues you have._
